sprint_meta.notes: WK18 LLM-AI Merger, Physicality, & Dev Tools. Agent 03: collision/separation + LLM tools into engine.

wk18_r1_kickoff.prompt_text: Implement soft collision/flocking separation for heroes; hook Agent 06 LLM tools (leave_building, move_to) into engine physical state.

summary_bullets: Soft collision: _apply_hero_separation(dt) in engine after hero updates; min_dist 22px, strength 90px/s; heroes no longer stack exactly on top of each other.

LLM move_to hook: hero.llm_move_request added; engine drains it after AI update into hero.set_target_position(); llm_bridge resolves target string (castle, marketplace, inn, blacksmith) to (x,y) and sets llm_move_request so hero executes move physically.
leave_building already applied in bridge (pop_out_of_building); no engine change needed.
how_to_test: Manual: multiple heroes near same spot separate; LLM/mock move_to to castle/marketplace moves hero there
